title: Inhibitors of mint and uses thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to compounds with high affinity for the PTB domain of Mint proteins. The compound interacts with Mint, blocking the native protein-protein interactions between Mint and their natural ligands. The invention furthermore relates to the therapeutic use of these compounds in prevention and/or treatment of neurodegenerative diseases, such as cognitive diseases, for example Alzheimer's disease, as well as to the use for diagnosing Alzheimer's disease.
